XONLINE_PRESENCE

typedef struct _XONLINE_PRESENCE{
    XUID xuid;
    DWORD dwUserState;
    XNKID SessionID;
    DWORD dwTitleID;
    BYTE StateDataSize;
    BYTE StateData[MAX_STATEDATA_SIZE];
} XONLINE_PRESENCE, *PXONLINE_PRESENCE;

Members

xuid
Unique identifier of the player.
dwUserState

State of the player. This member is a combination of one or more of the following values:
Value Description
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_JOINABLE The player is in a session that other players can join.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_ONLINE The player is online.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_RECEIVEDREQUEST The player who enumerated the presence list has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_FRIEND_REQUEST message from the player represented by this XONLINE_PRESENCE structure.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_PLAYING The player is playing a game.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_RECEIVEDINVITE The player who enumerated the presence list has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_GAME_INVITE message from the player represented by this XONLINE_PRESENCE structure.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_VOICE The player has voice capability.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_RECEIVEDTEAMRECRUIT The player who enumerated the presence list has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_TEAM_RECRUIT message from the player represented by this XONLINE_PRESENCE structure.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_RECEIVEDCOMPREMINDER The player who enumerated the presence list has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_COMP_REMINDER message from the player represented by this XONLINE_PRESENCE structure.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_RECEIVEDCOMPREQUEST The player who enumerated the presence list has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_COMP_REQUEST message from the player represented by this XONLINE_PRESENCE structure.
XONLINE_PRESENCE_FLAG_RECEIVEDTITLECUSTOM The player who enumerated the presence list has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_TITLE_CUSTOM from the player represented by this XONLINE_PRESENCE structure.

SessionID
XNKID structure that contains the session identifier. If this structure is all zeros, the player is not in a session.
dwTitleID
Title identifier. If this value is zero, the title identifier is unknown.
StateDataSize
State data size, in bytes.
StateData
Array of BYTEs containing the state data.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

See Also
